title: Division by zero in the query planner.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(b INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c TEXT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t2(b, c) VALUES(1, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE b IN (SELECT b FROM t2 WHERE c IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(d DOUBLE PRECISION, e INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t3(d, e) VALUES(1.5, NULL);
key_bug_features: Division by zero due to sz=0 in sqlite_stat1
